name: HoloMyth and Advent Roommates
description:
Was bored, did a buncha gens and intros for this one but too lazy to type much else for it rn. Definitely wanna add more to this later if I ever can.

Here's the gens:

Kiara and Nerissa Accident

Ina took the wrong meds

Ame and Shiori taking note of the cake at the store

Kiara Baking

Nerissa Baking

Bijou Lap

Bijou and Ina Breast Envy

Fuwamoco Jealousy

Nerissa, Kiara, and Mori looking for lingerie

Hopefully this one works fine as is, but it wouldn't surprise me if it needs some more work tbh. Anyways as per usual lemme know if anything goes wrong and I hope you enjoy the bot.

Just added a new intro making it 8 now, this one was inspired by a random scuffed gen I got while bored

New intro inspired by this art: https://x.com/underdatv/status/2037036132618424715?s=20
That pp rock is funny and I did some gens about it too so have one of em
And yes I'm aware a lot of the old gens for my bots no longer work, I dunno if I can fix them so I'm just gonna wait for catbox to hopefully do something.
creator: Pandapple
